prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
raw_response: {"task_completion": true, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": true, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": true, "hallucinations": false, "suggestions": "Improve tool call ordering to avoid nested function calls"}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve tool call ordering to avoid nested function calls
